name: Wolfram von Richthofen
longDesc: Wolfram von Richthofen, cousin du « Baron rouge », dirige la Legion Condor puis le VIIIe Fliegerkorps, spécialiste de l'appui tactique Stuka. En WC4 carte aérienne tier-S or : bonus bombardier marqués, à associer à une armée blindée pour des pushs air-sol coordonnés.

skills.name: Air Raid Cover
skills.desc: When commanding an airforce unit to attack, there is 50% rate that our inactive units that are 1 grid around the enemy unit under attack will join the attack (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously).

skills.name: Airforce Leader
skills.desc: 32% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding air units

skills.name: Carpet Bombing
skills.desc: Damage +24% to the defending forces in the city when air-raiding

skills.name: Cover
skills.desc: 12% chance to dodge 36% damage from the enemy

skills.name: Rumor
skills.desc: 30% chance to reduce the morale of the enemy when attacking

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Wolfram von Richthofen, cousin of the 'Red Baron', led the Condor Legion and then VIII. Fliegerkorps, a Stuka close-air-support specialist. In WC4 he's a tier-S gold air-force card with strong bomber bonuses — pair him with an armoured column for coordinated air-ground pushes.
longDescDe: Wolfram von Richthofen, Cousin des „Roten Barons“, führte die Legion Condor und dann das VIII. Fliegerkorps — ein Spezialist für Stuka-Nahunterstützung. Als S-Klasse-Gold-Luftwaffenkarte im WC4 mit starken Bomberboni eignet er sich hervorragend für koordinierte Luft-Boden-Stöße mit Panzern.
